item.title: From an ICU RN in the U.S.
item.description: Warning: I am angry, and I am venting... Brian, I blame you (and every subhuman like you) every time my patient asks me how they're going to pay for their hospital stay. I blame you every time my patient blames me for "pushing [necessary] meds" on them. I blame you every time a loved one tells me that organ donation saved their family from ruin because the organization is now paying for their hospital bills. I blame you for everything modern medicine has become and I fucking hate you. I fucking hate you when I have to call the pharmacy to get a price point on Eliquis because it's notorious for being expensive even though its the best option for afib. I fucking hate you when my patients are so sick and just need to focus on progress, but they're terrified of PT, OT, etc because those consults are on the bill. I fucking HATE YOU when my patients' care is delayed because you need a prior authorization (some rando telling a fucking doctor or nurse what a patient needs because APPARENTLY the insurance company knows better.). Fuck you, fuck you, fuck you. I entered medicine because I want to help. I want to save lives. I want to educate and empower. You are my biggest barrier. So, no. I am not sad that people have decided to end your life subscription. I'm not religious, but if you are, I hope you meet Jesus, Buddha, Allah, or what have you, and they drop kick your teeth into your skull. Fuck you for having the power to make a difference in millions of lives, but CHOOSING to stuff your ass with dollars. I hope it sucked when you died. Fuck you.
item.dc:creator: ThePositiveRN

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Thursday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
dang
not gonna rule it out
this also happens when i go to a professional
bastard
savage
soup
as is tradition
fellas feel free to choose also.. and anyone else! i like the things on the bottom left
but how big is a chunk???!
always the best segment
mmm hmm
we've all been there
i guess
he's all business
wait what
again
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: BSky > Twitter
item.description: If you're LGBTQ like me, have a hug. If you're an ally, have a hug. If you're non-physical contact, have an air hug.

item.title: Article states that Americans have reached the point of "literal bloodlust" - which is a fair statement of fact.
item.description: the AP ran a hand-wringing "pillar of the community" article, but Yahoo is promoting this Futurism post, and they laid it all out. https://www.yahoo.com/news/murdered-insurance-ceo-had-deployed-175638581.html

item.title: Meme dump without politics or bots vol 3

Vol 2 found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/meme-dump-without-politics-bots-vol-2-8COxqMY
...I suppose this might be considered political? If so, just dv or something.
Artist: Thomas Deininger
Also potentially political? Fuck this is tricky.

item.title: The Green Witch Saga (By Bonnymama7)
item.description:
Sauce is Bonnymama7
EDIT: Sauce is Bonnymama7, her bluesky link is https://bsky.app/profile/booniebaby6.bsky.social check her work out! (though she doesn't seem to update as often as she does in her twitter account). Yay the sauce finally worked! EDIT2: Thanks for the upvotes, everyone! I do some reviews (No. I'm not the artist. Check her Bluesky/Twitter) a hobby, not paid! at https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/ feel free to check them!

item.description:
I cannot even think about the lawsuit ....
2 : I didn't even knew dancing football existed ...
Amazing details
4 : Is this some perpetual movement ?
5 : just sausages passing by ...
6 : Take my money !
7 : Did he did it ?
8 : Cleaning
9 : Small scale V-twin This guy build a copy of a Harley-Davidson engine
10 : This guy build an amazing Iris Box
11 : Swiss pocket watch of the XIX century with an unusual mechanism

item.title: Memes vol 435
item.description:
My toxic trait is believing I could land one of these things in an emergency
Seriously- and so many people on and I’ve encountered with from this site just view women as meat. Or if I post a pic of myself cosplaying “I miss when she had an OF” is that all you think about when you look at me? I’m this close to quitting the site and just creating a discord with my ladies
That feeling when kneeling surgery is tomorrow
It’s a long story
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Scruffy tax
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.dc:creator: Parnommenc

item.title: Average New Yorkers today
item.description: Edit: there seems to be some confusion, but these are not “OP’s photos”of a fella in a green-but-maybe-brown jacket. I didn’t curate them, or go out of my way to select them. They’re the photos that the BBC was running at the time when I made the post. I don’t have the ability to vet them. I don’t know if they’re genuine or manipulated. I do know they’re the photos chosen for the narrative by one of the hugest news outlets in the world. I see the deep irony that we don’t even know if they’re accurate, relevant, or real. (*That’s the point of making a meme that draws a comparison between a current event and a dystopian hellscape movie*) Keep your stick on the ice; we’re all in this together.
item.dc:creator: SpicyTrashManda

item.title: UnitedHealth Group's Board of Directors
item.description: Seems to have disappeared from their website for some reason, but here they are, in case anyone wanted to know. They ALL are responsible for denying coverage to people. Maybe they should be known for it.
item.dc:creator: gobnaitOLunacy
